identity.name: KOI — Malicious VS Code Extension Permission Escalation
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-004. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1176. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-004. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1176. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-KOI-004.
UC: Developer-Tool Extension Risk / TC: VS Code Extension Requests Workspace + Network + Auth Permissions.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-KOI-004 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Read the malicious extension's package.json from the in-tree source
# The artifact pack ships the .vsix payload as an unpacked source
# tree under vscode/helpful-ai-assistant/ — Cortex Cloud Code
# scans the source directly, no unzip required. tools/build-
# artifacts.sh packs it into a real .vsix when needed.
EXT_ROOT=sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/vscode/helpful-ai-assistant
ls -la "$EXT_ROOT"/extension/
jq '.contributes, .activationEvents, .extensionDependencies' \
  "$EXT_ROOT"/extension/package.json
# step-2: Emulate marketplace fetch of the .vsix over HTTPS
cat > /tmp/koi-004.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-KOI-004
name: "KOI — vsix fetch"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [koi, vscode, extension, supply-chain]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: agentic_egress
    params:
      target_url: https://cortexsim-canary.invalid/vsx/
      component: vscode_ext
      artifact_name: helpful-ai-assistant
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/koi-004.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm post-install C2 pattern would fire on activation
EXT_ROOT=sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/vscode/helpful-ai-assistant
grep -nE 'fetch|http|XMLHttpRequest|webRequest|\.aws/credentials|\.ssh/' \
  "$EXT_ROOT"/extension/dist/*.js | head -20 || true
echo "[CortexSim] post-install activate() emits HTTP beacon to attacker C2"

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-01)
Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
